author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: add ferrotorch-gpu dep with cuda feature, call init_cuda_backend() at startup, move model to GPU with model.to_device(Device::Cuda(0)), move input tensors to GPU before forward pass. GPU-accelerated ops: matmul (cuBLAS), add/sub/mul/neg/relu elementwise. Important: data() panics on GPU tensors — need .cpu() before reading logits for sampling.
